# Performance Test - 2000 Lines Raw Mode

This file has ~2000 lines for testing RAW mode editor performance.

The FerriteEditor uses virtual scrolling - only visible lines should render.


## Section 1

Line 0001: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. Pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs. How vexingly quick daft zebras jump!
